Follow or Bounce — Identity & System Presentation

EST. 2024 — Identity System

FOLLOW
.OR.
BOUNCE

A publication at the intersection of technology, literature, and the agreements that hold them together.

FOB.
V1.0 / 2024
Identity Statement 01 / 06
At a glance
3
Pillars
01
Current Issue
∞
Decision Paths

Ideas either earn their place,
or they don't.

Follow or Bounce is not a publication about technology. It is a publication that thinks through technology — alongside literature and law — to ask what we actually want from the systems we build and inhabit.

The name is the methodology. Every idea, product, or framework we encounter is subjected to a binary test: does it generate follow-through — action, understanding, change — or does it bounce, leaving the reader exactly where they started? We write for readers who want to distinguish between the two.

This identity system exists to make that distinction visible in every line, every weight, every margin.

Core Principles 02 / 06
P.01
CLARITY

Every visual decision is a claim. Make it defensible. Ambiguity is not sophistication — it is failure to commit.

P.02
DECISION FLOW

Structure precedes content. The reader should always know where they are and where the system intends to take them.

P.03
SIGNAL LOGIC

Noise is the enemy. Every element must earn its space. If a line, weight, or colour does not carry meaning, remove it.

P.04
SYSTEM THINKING

No component exists in isolation. Type, colour, grid, and interaction are one system — not a collection of choices.

P.05
DISCIPLINE

Restraint is the hardest skill. The identity holds its ground against trend, decoration, and the temptation to elaborate.

Design System 03 / 06
Typography Scale
Display BEBAS NEUE
Serif DM Serif Display
Mono DM Mono — system interface
Caption LABEL / 9PX / 0.22EM
Colour Logic
Ink — Primary

Paper — Ground
#F4F0E6
Rust — Accent / Signal
#C0390B
Fog — Tertiary / Meta

Grid & Rhythm

Border-based layout. No shadows. Ink on paper.

Applications 04 / 06
01 — Web
Editorial Interface

The primary publication layer. Grid-locked. Ruthlessly typographic.

02 — Product
Content Cards

Modular card system for technology, literature, and contracts sections.

03 — Form
Contact System

Zero-friction subscription and contact. Form as declaration of intent.

Vision 05 / 06

THE SYSTEM
IS THE
MESSAGE.

A publication's identity is not its logo or its palette. It is the totality of decisions it makes about what deserves space and what does not. Follow or Bounce is a system built to enforce that discipline at every scale — from a 9px caption to a 7rem headline.
